title: Omar (Deep Space Manufacturing Facilities)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Omar}}
The '''Omar''' were a group of three [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|Deep Space Manufacturing Facilities]] located in the [[Omar system/Legends|Omar system]]. These facilities were destroyed by [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] [[Raptor (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|''Raptor'']]. However, their personnel were given enough time to evacuate, and the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] was [[Death/Legends|destroyed]] by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].
